title: Envax Inventory Flow Module M1
description: Methodology-aligned draft schema for the inventory_flow module. It defines structure for business decision signals, not final stock logic.

business_purpose.description: Business purpose behind the inventory decision, for example release_cashflow or protect_basic_inventory.

inventory_bucket.description: Conceptual inventory classification produced by the module, for example dormant_stock, strategic_stock or season_opportunity.

sensors.description: Sensor outputs. Each sensor must be justified by variable, threshold, calculation or condition, result, suggested action and business purpose.

diagnosis.description: Business diagnosis produced from sensor signals.

decision.description: Recommended decision or next action. This is not automated execution.

module_signals.description: Signals emitted to other modules such as marketing, commercial, stock_policy or products.json integration.

threshold.description: Threshold or threshold hypothesis used by the sensor. Final thresholds require business data.

calculation_or_condition.description: Formula, ratio or condition that justifies the sensor result.
